title: Implement a data cleaning and transformation pipeline
instruction: Complete the data pipeline in pipeline.py. Implement: (1) load_csv to parse CSV with type inference and error handling, (2) clean_data to handle missing values, duplicates, and invalid types, (3) detect_outliers using IQR method with configurable multiplier, (4) transform_features for normalization and encoding, (5) aggregate_metrics for groupby statistics. Handle edge cases: empty datasets, all-null columns, mixed types, malformed CSV, Unicode data.
